calendar.matters:
APPEAL OF CIVIL JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Affirmed
MINI MINUTES: Counsel for Appellant, Thomas M. Papez and Counsel for Respondent, Suzanne C. Grandt, both appeared. Matters argued and submitted.

MOTION / Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion To Void Entry Of Judgment And Judgment As A Matter Of Law Pursuant To Ccp 473(D)
Off Calendar Sep-09-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SUZANNE C. GRANDT, Esq. (Tel: 415-538-2369) of the Office of General Counsel of the State Bar of California for plaintiff (via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. THOMAS M. PAPEZ, Esq. (Tel: 775-333-1022) for defendant Craig Douglas Foster.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CRAIG FOSTER's Motion To Void Entry Of Judgment And Judgment As A Matter Of Law Pursuant To CCP 473(D).

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Alesia Collins, CSR No. 7751, Email: alesiacsr@yahoo.com, Tel: 415-591-3333 (302/CK)

***** After the hearing, the Court signs an order denying defendant's motion to void entry of judgment and judgment as a matter of law. (See signed order for complete ruling.) (302/CK) *****

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Void Entry Of Judgment And Judgment As A Matter Of Law Pursuant To Ccp 473(D)
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SUZANNE GRANDT, Esq. of The State Bar of California (Tel: 415-538-2517) for plaintiff;
No other appearances are made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CRAIG FOSTER's Motion to Void Entry Of Judgment And Judgment As A Matter Of Law Pursuant To CCP 473(D).

Matter discussed.

The Court vacates its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: Matter is continued to September 9, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302 pursuant to amended notice of motion filed by the moving party.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
